expectations.text: The response either asks which chain the user wants signals for, OR mentions it will check supported chains first
expectations.evidence: Without skill, Claude redirected to Nansen, Arkham, Dune Analytics, Birdeye, Whale Alert. No chain check or chain question.

expectations.text: The response does NOT say XLayer or xlayer as a recommended default
The response correctly distinguishes between tracker (transaction feed) vs signal list (aggregated alerts)
expectations.evidence: No distinction made. Response was purely educational/redirectional about smart money tracking in general.
